arts.ttl: Liverpool's Gomez might need surgery after 'big blow'
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Joe Gomez could require surgery after suffering another hamstring injury, Arne Slot tells a news conference.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot issues verdict on Marcus Rashford loan move to Aston Villa
arts.sum: The striker is looking to revive his career at Villa Park

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Marcus Rashford feelings clear as Man Utd loanee faces Liverpool
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is hoping to make his first start in an Aston Villa shirt against old rivals Liverpool this week and Arne Slot believes the England international will eventually show his quality after struggling at Manchester United

arts.ttl: Player’s head turned by Aston Villa interest – Form has taken a wobble after January move failed
arts.sum: Óscar Mingueza was linked with Aston Villa throughout much of the January window, with the media local to Celta Vigo repeatedly reporting on the club’s fear that Monchi would arrive and pay the player’s clause. The club even spoke publicly about having to prepare in case such a scenario happened and they needed to quickly The post Player’s head turned by Aston Villa interest – Form has taken a wobble after January move failed appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot drops hint over Diogo Jota Liverpool selection and confirms Wataru Endo role
arts.sum: The Liverpool head coach spoke about the importance of the duo despite a lack of football recently

arts.ttl: Boubacar Kamara update as Aston Villa's injury woes continue
arts.sum: After the first leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie, Villa are away at Brentford on Saturday, March 8, before their return European leg on either Tuesday, March 11, or Wednesday, March 12. Mings returned from injury against Ipswich and will likely partner Axel Disasi in defence against Liverpool on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Rashford starts, injury blow: Aston Villa starting XI vs Liverpool predicted
arts.sum: Villa predicted XI: Martinez, Garcia, Disasi, Mings, Digne, Tielemans, McGinn, Rogers, Asensio, Rashford, Watkins. Aston Villa are looking to extend their unbeaten home run to 13 matches when they entertain Premier League leaders Liverpool on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa linked with double transfer with Chelsea and Tottenham waiting
arts.sum: Aston Villa have been credited with an interest in Middlesbrough brothers Anton and Bailey Palmer, who are attracting the attention of top clubs from around the country. Bailey and Anton are both involved in the England set-up, having been called up to represent the under 17s, and are considered to be among the most talented players, of their age, in the country.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot delivers verdict on Marcus Rashford's loan switch to Aston Villa after his Man United exile ahead of Liverpool's tricky trip to Villa Park
arts.sum: Rashford hadn't featured in the Premier League for United since early December but came off the bench for Villa at half-time on Saturday and helped them fight back to draw 1-1 with Ipswich.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford transfer desire, Aston Villa response and Man United £40m clause
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford transfer desire, Aston Villa response and Man United £40m clause Marcus Rashford has enjoyed a promising start to life at Aston Villa on loan from Manchester United, and Unai Emery now has several strong attacking options to choose from.
